description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named C/C++ CI that runs on every push to main and on pull requests to main. Use a single ubuntu-22.04 job with read permissions for actions, checks, contents, and write permissions for issues and pull requests. The job should check out the repository, install dependencies, initialize submodules, download prebuilt files and SGXSDK, install SGXSDK, and then build the project using make.
